query: SELECT section, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN period_no IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as filled, SUM(CASE WHEN period_no IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as remaining FROM payment_transactions GROUP BY section;
